name: Quack Quest
author: Poki
description: Get ready to relax in Quack Quest - a charming idle crafting game set on an idilic island, which lets you live out your tropical vacation dreams! There are many different resources for you to gather in order to expand your domain, and you can use the game's crafting system to make ever more advanced items. What's more, you can change the entire rules of the game by using currency the game awards you in order to increase item drop rates and harvesting speed. Are you ready to embark on an epic quest? How do I play Quack Quest? Click anywhere with your mouse to move and interact with objects. Who created Quack Quest? Quack Quest is created by GigaMegaGames. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Quack Quest for free? You can play Quack Quest for free on Poki. Can I play Quack Quest on mobile devices and desktop? Quack Quest can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
